implementer.description: Implementation dispatches: write or fix code and tests to satisfy a task brief. Use for every implementer prompt template dispatch.

verifier.description: Verification dispatches: adversarially verify a task or phase against acceptance criteria and the spec. Use for every verifier/reviewer prompt template dispatch.

implementer-frontier.description: Frontier implementation dispatches: use ONLY for tasks 2.1 and 4.2, per the human's halt decisions (6 failed implementer dispatches each). Every other implementation dispatch goes to the implementer agent.
